description: Trigger a data pipeline run and wait for completion. Returns job instance details.
notes: Without --wait, returns immediately with {"status":"accepted","jobId":"..."}. Pipeline runs can also be triggered via schedule: fabio data-pipeline create-schedule. List past runs: fabio data-pipeline list-instances. Cancel a running job: fabio job-scheduler cancel-instance.

query_examples.description: Error message if failed (null if succeeded).
